_comment: SERVICE CATALOGUE — Add, remove, or edit services here. Each category has an id, name, icon (Lucide icon name), and a list of services. To toggle pricing on/off globally, use sections.showPricing in site.json.
heading: Our Services
subheading: From signature hair transformations to deeply restorative spa rituals — everything you need, under one roof.

services.name: Swedish Full Body Massage
services.description: A therapeutic full-body massage using warm oils to relieve muscle tension, reduce stress, and restore deep calm.

services.name: Aromatherapy Massage
services.description: Essential oil-infused massage tailored to your mood — relaxing, uplifting, or energising — for a holistic experience.

services.name: Hot Stone Therapy
services.description: Warm basalt stones melt away deep muscle tension while promoting circulation and profound relaxation.

services.name: Deep Tissue Massage
services.description: Firm-pressure technique targeting deeper muscle layers to release chronic tension and knots.

services.name: Back & Shoulder Massage
services.description: Focused pressure massage targeting the neck, back, and shoulders — ideal after a long week.

services.name: Couple's Spa Ritual
services.description: Enjoy a shared spa experience — side-by-side massages with your partner in a calming, private setting.

services.name: Full Body Scrub & Polish
services.description: Exfoliating scrub that removes dead skin cells, revealing soft, smooth, and radiant skin from head to toe.

services.name: Herbal Body Wrap
services.description: Detoxifying body wrap using herbal-infused linen to draw out impurities, tighten skin, and restore glow.

services.name: Steam Therapy Session
services.description: Open pores, flush toxins, and deeply relax with a therapeutic steam session before your treatment.

services.name: De-Stress Body Ritual
services.description: Our signature package — full body scrub, herbal wrap, and massage combined for complete renewal.

services.name: Foot Reflexology
services.description: Pressure-point massage on the feet that promotes circulation, relieves fatigue, and restores energy.

services.name: Haircut & Blow Dry
services.description: Precision cut tailored to your face shape, finished with a professional blow-dry for that salon-fresh bounce.

services.name: Hair Wash & Blow Dry
services.description: Deep cleanse with a nourishing shampoo and conditioner, styled to perfection.

services.name: Hair Ironing / Curling
services.description: Sleek straight looks or bouncy curls — styled with heat protection for a lasting finish.

services.name: Keratin Treatment
services.description: Frizz-free, glossy, and manageable hair that lasts for months. Perfect for thick or unruly hair.

services.name: Smoothening / Rebonding
services.description: Chemical straightening treatment for pin-straight, silky-smooth hair with long-lasting results.

services.name: Global Hair Colour
services.description: Full head colour using salon-grade dyes. Available in natural shades, fashion colours, and everything in between.

services.name: Highlights / Lowlights
services.description: Dimensional colour that adds depth, brightness, or contrast — foil, balayage, or ombre style.

services.name: Balayage
services.description: Hand-painted colour technique for a natural sun-kissed look with effortless grow-out.

services.name: Root Touch-Up
services.description: Quick and precise root application to keep your colour looking fresh between full sessions.

services.name: Ombre / Dip Dye
services.description: Gradual colour transition from dark roots to lighter tips, customised to your preference.

services.name: Classic Facial
services.description: Cleanse, exfoliate, steam, extract, and moisturise — the essential facial for healthy, balanced skin.

services.name: Gold Facial
services.description: Luxury gold-infused facial to boost radiance, improve elasticity, and leave skin with a luminous glow.

services.name: Anti-Tan Facial
services.description: Targeted de-tanning treatment to even skin tone and restore natural brightness after sun exposure.

services.name: Bridal Glow Facial
services.description: Multi-step brightening and hydration ritual designed to give brides a radiant, camera-ready complexion.

services.name: Skin Cleanup
services.description: A quick yet effective deep-pore cleanse — perfect for maintaining skin between full facial sessions.

services.name: Haircut & Styling
services.description: Sharp, clean cuts — from classic to contemporary. Every cut is styled and finished with precision.

services.name: Beard Shaping & Trim
services.description: Defined lines, even length, and a clean neckline. Your beard, at its most refined.

services.name: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Traditional straight-razor shave with hot towel and post-shave balm — the full barbershop experience.

services.name: Men's Facial
services.description: Deep cleanse, scrub, and massage tailored for men's thicker skin — leaves you looking refreshed and glowing.

services.name: D-Tan & Cleanup
services.description: Remove sun tan, open pores, and dull skin. Quick, effective, and suitable for all skin types.

services.name: Head Massage
services.description: Relaxing scalp and shoulder massage using warm oil to melt away tension and boost circulation.

services.name: Orchid Signature Hair Spa
services.description: Our full ritual — deep cleanse, nourishing mask, scalp massage, and steam. Your hair will thank you.

services.name: Protein Hair Treatment
services.description: Replenishes lost proteins in your hair for strength, elasticity, and reduced breakage.

services.name: Dandruff Treatment
services.description: Targeted scalp treatment using anti-dandruff actives to soothe, cleanse, and balance your scalp.

services.name: Scalp Detox Ritual
services.description: Deep-cleansing scalp treatment to remove buildup, balance oil production, and stimulate healthy hair growth.

services.name: Classic Manicure
services.description: Soaking, filing, shaping, cuticle care, and a fresh polish application — hands that feel and look immaculate.

services.name: Classic Pedicure
services.description: Deep soak, scrub, callus removal, nail shaping, and moisturising — your feet deserve the royal treatment.

services.name: Gel Nails (Manicure)
services.description: Long-lasting, chip-resistant gel colour with a high-shine finish. Lasts 2–3 weeks without fading.

services.name: Spa Pedicure
services.description: Upgraded pedicure with an extended foot soak, scrub, mask, and massage — pure luxury for tired feet.

services.name: Full Arms Waxing
services.description: Smooth, long-lasting hair removal using skin-friendly wax for soft, even results.

services.name: Full Legs Waxing
services.description: Complete leg wax from ankle to thigh, leaving skin touchably smooth.

services.name: Eyebrow Threading
services.description: Defined, clean arches shaped to complement your face — precise and quick.

services.name: Upper Lip Threading
services.description: Quick and effective hair removal for the upper lip area.

services.name: Full Face Waxing
services.description: Gentle waxing of the full face for smooth, flawless skin — safe for sensitive skin.
